commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: “The opened eyes of the blind” means [Christ] provided clear knowledge of the Father through the Son. - "Stromateis 1.19.92.2"

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: House. The Jews out of captivity, prefigured the redemption of mankind. These miracles proved that Jesus was the Messias, Luke vii. 22.
